name: DealHub CPQ and Revenue Operations API
what_it_does: Revenue operations platform with REST API — providing CPQ (configure-price-quote) for complex product configurations, digital sales room (DealRoom) for buyer-seller collaboration, contract management with eSignature, subscription management and renewals, and revenue analytics with Salesforce and HubSpot native integration.
use_cases: Generating configured quotes programmatically via DealHub CPQ API
Querying quote status and approval workflow progress for pipeline analytics
Integrating DealHub deal data with Salesforce for complete opportunity management
Automating subscription renewal quote generation based on contract milestones
Pulling revenue analytics (ARR, bookings, expansion revenue) for financial reporting
not_for: Simple PDF quote generation without configuration (use PandaDoc for simpler quotes)
RFP response management (use Loopio or RFPIO for RFPs)
Billing and subscription management without sales workflow (use Stripe or Chargebee)
best_when: A B2B SaaS or technology company wants CPQ with complex product configuration rules, buyer collaboration in digital sales rooms, and subscription lifecycle management tightly integrated with Salesforce or HubSpot.
avoid_when: You have simple pricing without configuration, need standalone billing without sales workflow, or are a B2C company without complex configure-price-quote requirements.

auth.notes: API key from DealHub account settings. Bearer token auth. Org-scoped access. Webhook for quote status changes, approval events, and contract signatures. Salesforce and HubSpot native integrations. No OAuth2 for primary API.

pricing.notes: Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2016. Raised $60M+ Series B. Backed by Think Investments, Entree Capital. Digital Sales Room (DealRoom) differentiator — buyer-facing collaboration space with content, proposals, and contract in one link. No-code pricing rule engine. Subscription lifecycle management including upsell and renewal automation. Strong in B2B SaaS revenue teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for quotes, DealRooms, contracts, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. CPQ configuration rules managed in DealHub admin — API generates quotes using configured catalog. Approval workflow routing configured in admin. Webhook for deal lifecycle events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Quote reads idempotent. Contract reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent. Quote creation not idempotent — check for existing quote before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: CPQ rules and product catalog configured in DealHub admin — not API-driven setup
DealRoom creation requires Salesforce opportunity — not standalone
Quote approval workflows must be configured before API-triggered quotes route correctly
Israeli company with US/EU data residency options — verify for compliance
Annual contract — significant commitment before API integration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Quote pricing and product configuration data is commercially sensitive — restrict API access. DealRoom buyer engagement data is behavioral — GDPR consideration. Israeli company with strong enterprise security posture.
